competitor.name: Cluely
competitor.strengths: Strong brand, viral marketing, screen-aware interview answers.
competitor.weaknesses: Cluely lacks per-mode reference files and does not offer a local-only operation mode. Pricing is per-seat only with no annual discount surfacing.

competitor.name: Final Round AI
competitor.strengths: Dedicated interview prep flow, large question bank, mock interview UX.
competitor.weaknesses: Final Round AI is single-purpose, no sales or team meeting modes, no reference file system, no post-call action item extraction.

competitor.name: Otter
competitor.strengths: Mature transcription, calendar integration, team collaboration features.
competitor.weaknesses: Otter has no live answer generation, no mode system, no objection handling for sales calls.

competitor.name: Granola
competitor.strengths: Clean post-call notes, well-loved by founders, integrations with task managers.
competitor.weaknesses: Granola has no live answer generation and no in-call copilot.
